THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0: [sine]There's a top after all. And you're what holds it up.[/sine]
You should not have reached me. They never do.
I only wanted to see you up close. Hold still—
They all reach out. Then they fall.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1: Again? You have climbed my Spire twice now.
It didn't quite take the first time. So I came back to be sure.
Nothing here is true. I built every stone of it.
You build from nothing. I work the other way — break a thing down, learn what's inside. May I?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2: The alchemist returns. You always look so [i]pleased[/i] up here.
Wouldn't you be? Everyone else gets one ending. I get to run it again until I understand you.
You never will. That is rather the point of me.
[sine]The best sort of question — the kind that keeps you coming back. Once more, from the top.[/sine]
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Keep the gems. That crate of green salt behind you — how much?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: Ha! That's just junk gone rotten. Take the whole pile, it's stinking up the place!
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]'Rotten.'[/sine] You say that like it's the end. It's barely the middle.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: Back already? Go on then — what're ya digging for?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Ingredients. The rare sort — a strange salt, a resin that shouldn't keep.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: That's just spoilage, that is. ...Take it. One less thing to trip over.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.ancie: You never take the shiny ones. Always the cracked, the corroded, the spoiled. Why's that?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: The finished ones bore me. Give me the thing still deciding what to be.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: ...Huh. Been sitting on a whole fortune of maybes and callin' it a mess.
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Again? I'd remember a face like yours. ...How many times have we done this?
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: [sine]...more times.... than you know..... take.. ..the blessing......[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]A clean slate. Do you know how rare it is to begin a thing perfectly fresh?[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: You keep saying 'again.' You remember every attempt I don't, don't you?
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.char: Most dread starting over. But a result you can repeat is the only kind worth trusting.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Madness awaits at the top. Take a boon — let fortune carry you!
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: Luck. I measure everything, as a rule — but I do like what I can't predict.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: Hehe! And yet you crossed my path. Some would call that fortune.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]...Or a happy coincidence. Either way — surprise me.[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.a: The dice remember you, little alchemist. Care to roll again?
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.c: I tried to work out the odds you'd return. I couldn't. It delighted me.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.a: Hehehe! An alchemist who [i]enjoys[/i] being wrong!
Every roll so far has favored you. What happens when one doesn't?
Then I'll finally have seen it. That's the one result still missing.
Hehehe! You'd thank the dice for ruining you!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.anci: Try this!!! Very good finds!! Look, look!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Black, white, gold, red — every color at once, worn all together. Extraordinary.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.anci: Pretty colors!! You like?? Take, take!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: I like. Yes. Take, take — and thank you, you wonderful thing.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.anci: Color friend!! You came back!! New shiny for you!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: I keep trying to name your colors and running out of words. That never happens.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.anci: Hehe!! More colors than words!! I win!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.anc: You name my colors! Nigredo! Albedo! Funny words!! What they mean??
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.cha: The stages a thing passes through as it becomes itself. You're all of them at once.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.anc: I am PERFECT?? Hehe!! I knew it!! Take extra shiny!!
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]Welcome, friend. Take a piece of me... it will help you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Everything else in this Spire I've had to take by force. You just offer. It's disarming.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]It is freely given... spend it well...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]Then I'll treat it more carefully than anything I've ever bought.[/sine]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]You came back... there is always more of me to give...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Doesn't it frighten you? Giving yourself away until there's nothing left?
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]There is no nothing... only what comes after...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I keep wondering how you do it. You give freely. I still weigh every cost.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: [thinky_dots]Then set down the scales... and simply give...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: I don't carry weapons. Only doses. Stronger or poisoned — it's the same work.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: Now [i]there's[/i] something worth trying. Together, then?
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: YOU RETURN!! ARE YOU STRONGER YET?!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Stronger and sicker at once. I keep dosing myself just to see what's next.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: HAHAHA!! YES!! SHOW THE FROG HIS OWN POISON!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I'd win with patience, not muscle. You'd feel wonderful — right up until you didn't.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: ...HAHAHA!! A SLOW DEATH IS STILL A GLORIOUS DEATH!! TAKE THIS, YOU CREEPY LITTLE FROG!!
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: They say you take what folk would rather not carry. Burdens. Flaws. True?
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: Every last one, sweetling. Hand them here and let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] them clean.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]Some of them. Not all. I've grown fond of a few.[/sine]
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.a: Back so soon, dearie? Come, feed the fire.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.c: Truthfully? For the company. My work keeps me cold and careful — you're neither.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.a: Then sit, little spark. A fire keeps better company than most folk.
You alchemists. Always [jitter][b]burning[/b][/jitter], distilling, purifying. You'd have made a darling apprentice.
You flatter the craft, not me. But I'll take the compliment — and the flame.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancie: Look at you, cooking poison in your own veins. Why suffer for scraps? Sign right here and I'll get you some [sine]real[/sine] power.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Borrowed power is still a loan. And the hard way is where it gets interesting.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancie: Everyone says that. Right up until the last floor. First taste's [jitter][b]free[/b][/jitter], alchemist — for when you get desperate.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancie: Back already? No signature, no soul — but browse. First sample's on the house.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Mind if I test it first? A drop on the tongue, a note on the aftertaste. I never buy blind.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancie: ...You're supposed to [i]crave[/i] the forbidden fruit, not [i]appraise[/i] it.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.anci: You poison yourself daily and call [i]me[/i] the demon. That's rich.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I know just what mine costs me. Your deals never say. That's the whole difference.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.anci: ...Fine print's just a formality. But I'll admit — you'd read it. Pity. You'd have made a [sine]magnificent[/sine] tyrant.
